workSections.heading: Replit AI Assistant
workSections.description1: Led the design and development of Replit's AI-powered coding assistant, helping millions of developers write better code faster.
workSections.description2: Collaborated with cross-functional teams to create an intuitive interface that seamlessly integrates AI capabilities into the coding workflow.

workSections.heading: Microsoft Design System
workSections.description1: Contributed to Microsoft's design system, creating scalable components used across multiple products and platforms.
workSections.description2: Focused on accessibility standards and cross-platform consistency, ensuring seamless user experiences across devices.

workSections.heading: Cornell DCC Platform
workSections.description1: Built and maintained the Digital Communications Center platform, serving thousands of students and faculty.
workSections.description2: Implemented modern web technologies and responsive design principles to create an engaging digital experience.
